title: Save the date! Elevate23 is coming
excerpt: Elevate is coming! If you are new here, Elevate is our yearly customer conference, and this year, we are having both in-person and online events created especially for our community members.  Whatever your skills, level,…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Elevate is coming! If you are new here, Elevate is our yearly customer conference, and this year, we are having both in-person and online events created especially for our community members. Whatever your skills, level, industry, and interest, you can choose from customized sessions, including work management best practices, salesCRM masterclass, product roadmap, customer stories, and more!

Community pro tip: Search the tag elevate23 for updates about all things Elevate 2023

Stay tuned for more details and registration!

P.S. You can already register for Elevate online (December 14) and save the dates to your calendar!

Elevate community STD1080×1080 24.8 KB

posts.author: vjabbinante13 (Vito Abbinante)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a link to add Elevate to our calendar(s)? I don’t see it on the site or in the email after signing up.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Vito!

Hope you were able to tune in! If you missed any sessions its not too late to watch the live and on-demand sessions at Watch - Elevate 2023 by monday.com
